meaning: a period of time that is fair and appropriate given the situation
partOfSpeech: noun phrase（可数，通常用单数；也说 a reasonable amount of time）
coreMeaning: a period of time that is fair and appropriate given the situation — not too short, not too long
coreImage: 天平刚好平衡的一段时间，不偏左也不偏右
chineseMeaning: 合理的时间；适当的时间
fable: 有位法官要求双方在「合理时间内」提交证据。甲方等了三年才交，法官说：「超时了。」乙方五分钟后递上一张白纸，法官说：「太快了，这叫敏衍。」只有丙方，两周后交来厕厕一叠材料。法官点头：「这才是 reasonable time。」丙方问：「到底多少天算合理？」法官说：「不够让人怀疑你偷懒，也不多让人怀疑你在拖延。」
moral: reasonable time 不是固定的数字，是根据情境判断的「刚好合适」。
memoryHook: reasonable（合理的）+ time（时间）→ 一个天平刚好平衡的时间量，不快不慢。（视觉钉：法官的天平）
anchorSentence: Please allow a reasonable time for the team to review the proposal.
collocations: expect a response within a reasonable time
activeChunks: complete the task within a reasonable time
give me a reasonable time to review this
expect a reply within a reasonable time
sentencePatterns: Please allow a reasonable time for ...
I need a reasonable time to ... before I can ...
It's fair to expect ... within a reasonable time.
personalExample: I always give my team a reasonable time to review code before merging.
notes: reasonable time（合理时长，情境决定）vs. specific time（具体时间点）。in time（赶上了）vs. on time（准时）vs. within a reasonable time（在合适的时间范围内完成）。法律英语中常见：within a reasonable time = 在法院认为合理的期限内。
recallQuestions: 那位用天平判断「不快不慢」的法官，对应哪个英文短语？
reasonable time 的核心意思是什么？用简单英文解释。
用 within 或 allow 写一句和你工作中等待或截止日期有关的英文句子。
